name: Robin Actor 6
comment: ROBIN Actor 6 is based on the hugely successful ROBIN® LEDWash Series and has been developed specifically for the theatrical and TV markets. This lightweight static head with manual pan/tilt uses 37 super-bright RGBW multichip LEDs with a linear motorized zoom of 8-63 degrees, smooth colour mixing and linear dimming without RGB ’breakup’ or grey shadows.

capabilities.comment: Zone + Rainbow effects slow to fast
Zone + Rainbow effects fast to slow
Random zone effect slow to fast
Random zone + strobe effect slow to fast
Random strobe slow to fast (all zones)
